steps: To prep, keep all ingredients refrigerated until chilled. 02:00:00 Ingredients: • Zeigler's Apple Cider 64 oz – also works with any apple cider brand $4.59 • 1 bottle of champagne, La Marca Prosecco is what I use, but also works with your preferred champagne $14.07 • Optional add ons – Marzetti Caramel Dip, Classic 13.05 oz $4.99

IF YOU CHOOSE TO ADD CARAMEL, start by taking a 12 oz glass and dipping the top of the glass into the caramel so it will be on the rim. IF YOU CHOOSE TO MAKE THE DRINK WITHOUT CARAMEL, proceed to the below steps.

Pour 1/2 cup of champagne and 1/2 cup of apple cider in a 12 oz glass. Be sure not to overpour, as it could cause the drink to become too sweet If you prefer less champagne, shift to pouring 1/4 cup of champagne and 3/4 cup of apple cider
Once you have mixed the ingredients listed above, your apple cider mimosa is ready!
creator: Diana Curcio
